patch:
--- a/shift_register.v
+++ b/shift_register.v
@@ -16,10 +16,10 @@ module shift_register_controller (
   output [31:0] parallel_out
 );
   shift_register sr_inst (
     .clk(clock),
     .reset_n(reset_n),
+    .serial_in(serial_input),
     .shift_direction(direction),
     .parallel_load(load_enable),
     .parallel_in(parallel_input),
     .parallel_out(parallel_out)
   );
before_code:
module shift_register (
  input clk,
  input reset_n,
  input serial_in,
  input shift_direction,
  input parallel_load,
  input [31:0] parallel_in,
  output [31:0] parallel_out
);
  reg [31:0] shift_reg;
  always @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n) begin
    if (!reset_n) shift_reg <= 32'b0;
    else if (parallel_load) shift_reg <= parallel_in;
  end
  assign parallel_out = shift_reg;
endmodule

module shift_register_controller (
  input clock,
  input reset_n,
  input serial_input,
  input direction,
  input load_enable,
  input [31:0] parallel_input,
  output [31:0] parallel_out
);
  shift_register sr_inst (
    .clk(clock),
    .reset_n(reset_n),
    .shift_direction(direction),
    .parallel_load(load_enable),
    .parallel_in(parallel_input),
    .parallel_out(parallel_out)
  );
endmodule
after_code:
module shift_register (
  input clk,
  input reset_n,
  input serial_in,
  input shift_direction,
  input parallel_load,
  input [31:0] parallel_in,
  output [31:0] parallel_out
);
  reg [31:0] shift_reg;
  always @(posedge clk or negedge reset_n) begin
    if (!reset_n) shift_reg <= 32'b0;
    else if (parallel_load) shift_reg <= parallel_in;
  end
  assign parallel_out = shift_reg;
endmodule

module shift_register_controller (
  input clock,
  input reset_n,
  input serial_input,
  input direction,
  input load_enable,
  input [31:0] parallel_input,
  output [31:0] parallel_out
);
  shift_register sr_inst (
    .clk(clock),
    .reset_n(reset_n),
    .serial_in(serial_input),
    .shift_direction(direction),
    .parallel_load(load_enable),
    .parallel_in(parallel_input),
    .parallel_out(parallel_out)
  );
endmodule
